buildCommand: NODE_ENV=development npx pnpm@9 install --no-frozen-lockfile --strict-peer-dependencies=false && echo '=== INSTALL DONE ===' && npx pnpm@9 --filter @workspace/admin-dashboard run build && echo '=== BUILD DONE ===' && mkdir -p dist && cp -r artifacts/admin-dashboard/dist/public/. dist && echo '=== COPY DONE ==='
